allow: Bash(python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('run.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); ast.parse\(open\('scrapers/nhatot_fast_scraper.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('OK'\)")

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('data/final/2026-04-20/141425_merged.json',encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\('total:',len\(d['listings']\)\); print\('unique phones:', len\({x.get\('phone_full'\) for x in d['listings'] if x.get\('phone_full'\)}\)\); print\('property_types:', sorted\({x.get\('property_type'\) for x in d['listings']}\)\); print\('transaction_types:', sorted\({x.get\('transaction_type'\) for x in d['listings']}\)\); print\('poster_types:', sorted\({x.get\('poster_type'\) for x in d['listings']}\)\)")
